questions.hindi: सूचना: कल विद्यालय बंद रहेगा।
questions.english: Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: 'Notice:' + clear announcement + audience + action required + issuing authority
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow."
questions.category: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice practice
